news_metadata.title: 测试：特斯拉上海工厂上游零部件到港延迟，电动车交付节奏承压
news_metadata.content: 受港口临时拥堵与跨境运输排队影响，特斯拉上海工厂部分关键零部件到货时间延后，包括动力电池相关材料、车规级芯片与线束组件。多家供应商表示正在协调空运与铁路联运以缓解交付压力，预计未来一周整车排产与出货节奏将出现阶段性波动。

level1.reason: 动力电池相关材料 refers to materials for power batteries (e.g., lithium, cathode/anode materials, electrolytes), which are industrial chemical or mineral-based components, not covered by any of the given HS Level 1 categories focused on agricultural, food, animal, or plant products.

hs_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: HS Level1匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值

segment.reason: 动力电池相关材料 (power battery related materials) are core components for electrical energy storage and supply, falling under Electrical Supplies in GPC segmentation.

family.reason: 动力电池相关材料 (power battery related materials) does not match any of the given electrical hardware or cabling/distribution categories; it belongs to battery materials, which is outside the scope of the candidates.

gpc_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: GPC Family匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值

level1.reason: 车规级芯片属于半导体集成电路，不属于任何给定的农产品或初级加工品HS大类

hs_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: HS Level1匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值

segment.reason: Car-grade chips are semiconductor components used in automotive electronics and embedded systems, falling under computing hardware infrastructure.

family.reason: 车规级芯片 refers to automotive-grade semiconductor chips, which are components used in automotive electronics, not consumer computers or video games.

gpc_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: GPC Family匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值

level1.reason: 线束组件是电气连接部件，属于工业制成品，不在所列农业、食品、动植物类HS Level 1大类中

hs_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: HS Level1匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值

segment.reason: 线束组件 (wire harness assemblies) are electrical interconnection components used in wiring systems, falling under electrical supplies.

family.reason: 线束组件 (wire harness assembly) is a core product within electrical cabling/wiring, consisting of bundled wires and connectors for power and signal transmission.

class.reason: 线束组件 (harness assembly) refers to bundled electrical wires with connectors, directly falling under Electrical Wiring as a functional and structural wiring unit.

brick.reason: 线束组件 (wire harness assembly) is a collection of electrical wires bundled together, falling under the broader GPC Brick 'Electrical Wires'.
